title: otites velebiticus
intro: Otites velebiticus, also known as Velebit's otite, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is a rare, alpine plant found in limited areas of the Balkan Peninsula, and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various ailments.
